---
title: "aim1_longitudinal"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

# Load packages and data
```{r setting}
library(broom)
library(car)
library(patchwork)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, 
                                "PREVENTAD_biomarkers_filtered.rds"))

predictors_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, "PREVENTAD_predictors.rds"))
diagnosis <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_diagnosis.rds"))

all_dat <- biomarkers %>%
  left_join(predictors_dat, by = "CONP_ID") %>%
  mutate(gfap_log = log(gfap),
         nfl_log = log(nfl),
         ptau181_log = log(ptau181),
         ptau217_log = log(ptau217),
         ptau231_sqrt = sqrt(ptau231)) #%>%
  # column_to_rownames(var="CONP_ID")

ggplot(grs, aes(x = GRS)) +
  geom_density() 
```


# LMM - Longitudinal
```{r}
outcomes <- c("ab_ratio", "gfap_log", "nfl_log", "ptau181_log", "ptau217_log", "ptau231_sqrt")

models <- tribble(
  ~model, ~predictors,
  "model0", "years + baseline_age + sex + BMI + (1 | CONP_ID)",
  "model1", "years + baseline_age + sex + BMI + apoe + GRS + family_history + (1 | CONP_ID)",
  "model2", "years * (baseline_age + sex + BMI + apoe + GRS + family_history) + score_libra2 + (1 | CONP_ID)",
  "model3", "years * (baseline_age + sex + BMI + apoe + GRS + family_history + score_libra2 + score_cogd) + (1 | CONP_ID)"
)

long_preventad <- expand_grid(
  outcome = outcomes,
  models
) %>%
  mutate(
    eq = glue("{outcome} ~ {predictors}"),
    res = map(eq, ~lmer(as.formula(.), data = all_dat, REML = FALSE)),
    dataf = map(res, tidy),
    mod = map(res, glance)
  )
```


# Results
```{r}
res_long_preventad <- bind_rows(
  select(long_preventad, model, outcome, dataf)
) %>%
  unnest(dataf) %>%
  # unnest(res) %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(term, '^time|^GRS|^family_history|^score_libra2|^score_cogd|^baseline_age|^sex|^BMI|^apoe')
  ) %>%
  # Optional: filter for specific model
  # filter(model == 'L3') %>%
  arrange(outcome, model, term) %>%
  mutate(
    # Significance flag
    sig = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, TRUE, FALSE),
    
    # Confidence intervals
    conf.low = estimate - (std.error * 1.96),
    conf.high = estimate + (std.error * 1.96),
    
    # Exponentiated values for log-transformed outcomes
    exp_est = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ exp(estimate),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    exp_lci = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ exp(conf.low),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    exp_uci = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ exp(conf.high),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    pct_change = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ (exp_est - 1) * 100,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    # Result category
    res = case_when(
      sig == TRUE ~ "Significant",
      sig == FALSE ~ "Not Significant"
    ),
    
    # Significance stars
    stars = case_when(
      p.value >= 0.05 ~ "",
      p.value >= 0.01 & p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
      p.value >= 0.001 & p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***"
    ),
    
    # Categorize predictors
    category = case_when(
      term == "age" ~ "Demographics",
      term %in% c("sexMale", "sex") ~ "Demographics",
      term == "BMI" ~ "Demographics",
      str_detect(term, "^apoe") ~ "Genetics",
      term == "GRS" ~ "Genetics",
      str_detect(term, "^family_history") ~ "Family History",
      term == "score_libra2" ~ "LIBRA2",
      term == "score_cogd" ~ "CogDrisk",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  # Round numeric values
  mutate(across(c(estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, df,
                  conf.low, conf.high, exp_est, exp_lci, exp_uci, pct_change), 
                ~round(., digits = 3)))
```

```{r}
res_table <- res_long_preventad %>% 
  filter(model == "model3") %>%
  #filter(model %in% c("model0")) %>%
  select(outcome, model, term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, stars) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = outcome,
    names_sep = "_",
    values_from = c(estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, stars)
  ) %>%
  select(-model) %>%
  gt() %>% 
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**AB42/40**"),
    columns = ends_with("ab_ratio")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**GFAP**"),
    columns = ends_with("gfap_log")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**NfL**"),
    columns = ends_with("nfl_log")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**ptau181**"),
    columns = ends_with("ptau181_log")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**ptau217**"),
    columns = ends_with("ptau217_log")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**ptau231**"),
    columns = ends_with("ptau231_sqrt")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    starts_with("estimate")~ md("*Beta*"),
    starts_with("std.error")~ md("*SE*"),
    starts_with("statistic")~md("*Statistic*"),
    starts_with("p.value")~ md("*p.value*"),
    starts_with("stars")~""
  )
res_table

gtsave(res_table, 
       vwidth = 2000,
       filename = "PREVENTAD_model5.png", 
       path = AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$tables)
```
